package com.example.appserver.cache;

import static org.mockito.Mockito.*;
import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.*;

import java.util.List;

import org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
import org.mockito.Mockito;

import com.example.servercommon.model.MailTemplateSettingModel;
import com.example.servercommon.repository.MailTemplateSettingRepository;

class MailTemplateCacheTest {

    private MailTemplateSettingRepository mailTemplateSettingRepository;
    private MailTemplateCache mailTemplateCache;

    @BeforeEach
    void setUp() {
        // モック化
        mailTemplateSettingRepository = Mockito.mock(MailTemplateSettingRepository.class);
        // MailTemplateCache を spy 化して GenericCache のメソッド呼び出し確認
        mailTemplateCache = Mockito.spy(new MailTemplateCache(mailTemplateSettingRepository));
    }

    @Test
    void testUpdateCache_shouldReloadCacheWithDataFromRepository() {
        // 準備
        List<MailTemplateSettingModel> mockList = List.of(new MailTemplateSettingModel());
        when(mailTemplateSettingRepository.findAll()).thenReturn(mockList);

        // 実行
        mailTemplateCache.updateCache();

        // 検証
        verify(mailTemplateSettingRepository).findAll();
        verify(mailTemplateCache).reloadCache("mailTemplates", mockList);
    }

    @Test
    void testGetCache_shouldReturnCachedMailTemplates() {
        // 準備
        List<MailTemplateSettingModel> mockList = List.of(new MailTemplateSettingModel());
        doReturn(mockList).when(mailTemplateCache).getCache("mailTemplates");

        // 実行
        List<MailTemplateSettingModel> result = mailTemplateCache.getCache();

        // 検証
        verify(mailTemplateCache).getCache("mailTemplates");
        assertEquals(mockList, result);
    }
}
